results.title: Choreo buys Illinois RIA Resource Financial Group
results.description: Resource Financial Group holds about $700m in assets under management as of 30 April 2026.

results.title: Premier Energies opens 5.6 GW solar plant in Telangana; Reddy targets 10% share in 'Viksit Bharat'
results.description: Premier Energies has inaugurated its 5.6 GW solar module manufacturing facility in Telangana, taking its total module manufacturing capacity to 11.1 GW. The company also broke ground on a 6 GWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) facility and an 18,000 MTPA aluminium frames plant, strengthening India's clean energy manufacturing ecosystem. Telangana Chief Minister Revanth Reddy, who inaugurated the facility, said the state aims to become a global manufacturing hub and contribute at least 10% to PM's Viksit Bharat 2047 dream.

results.title: Why SC’s Tax Free Weekend comes after some students head back to school
results.description: Many have asked why South Carolina’s Tax Free Weekend happens after some students have already returned to school.

results.title: Nigerian soldiers now earn N100,000 monthly salary, says defence minister
results.description: The Minister of Defence, Christopher Musa, has disclosed that the Federal Government has increased the minimum monthly salary of Nigerian soldiers from N49,000 to N100,000 as part of efforts to improve the welfare of military personnel. Mr Musa made the disclosure in a preview clip of an interview scheduled to air on News Central on [...] The post Nigerian soldiers now earn N100,000 monthly salary, says defence minister appeared first on Daily Nigerian .
